trigger: GitHub Actions failed after Stage342. Uploaded logs show compile errors in MindSpiderEntity, TaintacleEntity, TaintacleGiantEntity and TC4ChampionModifierRuntime; screenshot also shows the Stage153 component-pedestal infusion selection guard.

github_errors_fixed.fix: Changed getVoicePitch() access to public and changed getExperienceReward(Player) adapter to Forge 1.19.2 getExperienceReward() signature. Harmless spider XP behaviour remains original-parity: 0 if harmless, otherwise superclass XP.

Changed getVoicePitch() access to public. Replaced target entity.onGround field access with a Forge 1.19.2 adapter using verticalCollisionBelow because Entity.onGround is protected for arbitrary targets. Self ground check remains this.onGround.
Changed getVoicePitch() access to public to match LivingEntity in Forge 1.19.2 official mappings.
Removed redundant pattern match against event.getEntity(), which already has LivingEntity type in this Forge target.
Removed catalyst-only fallback from findMatchingOriginalInfusionRecipe. Infusion recipe selection now returns a recipe only after catalyst and component pedestals match; otherwise null.

parity_note: No new TC4 mechanics, items, recipes, GUI, progression or textures were introduced. All changes are Forge 1.19.2 API adapters or strict-original infusion selection cleanup.
local_checks_passed: all Python audit steps from .github/workflows/main.yml through Stage215
gradle_build: Not run to completion in sandbox because the Gradle wrapper attempted to download Gradle 7.5.1 and DNS/network is unavailable here. GitHub logs were used as the compile source of truth.
